title: bursera pontiveteris
intro: Bursera pontiveteris is a species of tree in the family Burseraceae, commonly known as the "copal tree." The resinous sap of this tree is known for its medicinal properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Bursera pontiveteris include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds, as well as fight off infections. Traditional herbal preparations of Bursera pontiveteris include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
